summary: Tested Matchday Control Room match management functionality. Backend (20/20 tests passed): GET /api/admin/matches returns matches array correctly, PUT /api/admin/matches/{id} accepts all fields (home_team, away_team, competition, market_type, kickoff->start_time, status, scores), all 7 statuses accepted (scheduled, live, finished, suspended, postponed, cancelled, void), X3 toggle and live-update work. Admin UI (100%): Control Room modal opens without errors, Partite tab loads matches correctly with full table (Casa, Ospite, Comp, Mercato, X3, Orario, Score, Stato, Azioni columns), all action buttons present (Mod, X3, Score, X delete), Edit modal has all required fields (Squadra Casa, Squadra Ospite, Competizione, Mercato, Kickoff, Stato, Gol Casa, Gol Ospite), status dropdown has all 7 valid statuses, Import da API tab loads with league selector and search.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing matchday G1 with 10 matches
context_for_next_testing_agent: Control Room match management is fully functional. Backend PUT /api/admin/matches/{id} accepts: home_team, away_team, competition, market_type, kickoff (mapped to start_time), status, home_score, away_score. All 7 statuses work: scheduled, live, finished, suspended, postponed, cancelled, void. UI shows proper table with columns Casa, Ospite, Comp, Mercato, X3, Orario, Score, Stato, Azioni. Edit modal has all 8 fields. X3 toggle POST /admin/matches/{id}/special works. Score inline editor and status dropdown work.

backend_api_tests.GET_admin_matches_matchday_id: PASS - returns {count, matches} with array of matches
backend_api_tests.PUT_admin_matches_kickoff: PASS - kickoff maps to start_time in DB
backend_api_tests.PUT_admin_matches_all_fields: PASS - accepts all fields at once like UI

admin_ui_tests.partite_tab_loads: PASS - no forEach error, matches loaded
admin_ui_tests.table_columns: PASS - Casa, Ospite, Comp, Mercato, X3, Orario, Score, Stato, Azioni present
admin_ui_tests.edit_modal_fields: PASS - all 8 fields present (Squadra Casa, Squadra Ospite, Competizione, Mercato, Kickoff, Stato, Gol Casa, Gol Ospite)
admin_ui_tests.import_tab: PASS - loads with league selector and search
